summaries.title: Bound unbounded Maps in long-running webviews with LRUCache
summaries.summary: In long-running webviews with `retainContextWhenHidden: true`, unbounded data structures like plain `Map` objects cause memory leaks and crashes. The fix replaces unbounded maps with `LRUCache` (max 50, 5min TTL) and applies dedupe guards, debounce/throttle, retry caps, and strict cleanup effects to prevent resource accumulation.
